subject: WM-0087 ready for review
body: WM-0087 rerun after changes_requested: Chrome/Edge web-performance evidence unchanged; benchmark gate now stabilizes default sampling at 9 samples / 2 warmups without changing thresholds or baselines; final temp-artifact full-suite bench passed with entity-store 242.351ms vs 244.507ms baseline (-0.88%) and m5-alpha-content-long-run 63.413ms vs 74.634ms baseline (-15.04%); pnpm test:e2e --filter web-shell, taskctl validate, git diff --check, and pnpm quality all passed.
